headline: Assessing Ross Stores (ROST) Valuation After Strong Recent Share Price Momentum
summary: Context for Ross Stores shares Ross Stores (ROST) has attracted investor attention recently as its shares reflect a 1 day move of roughly 0%, alongside gains over the past week, month, and past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Ross Stores. At a share price of US$219.98, Ross Stores has seen momentum build recently, with a 90 day share price return of 17.84% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 70.50%. This may indicate that sentiment around its progress and risks is being reassessed...
